owner_facing_goal: 提供可由灵石原矿直接产出的下品灵石，并在服务器权威的灵石修炼结算中作为逐批消耗资源。

java_registration.properties: new Item.Properties() with vanilla-default stack size 64

behavior.server_client_boundary: The client sends only the existing START_SPIRIT intent. The logical server resolves the current registered realm stage, its spirit-stone batch cost, inventory availability, progress cap, and settlement result. No client-authored rate, layer, cost, inventory slot, progress, or success value is accepted.
behavior.interaction: The item has no right-click action. During an eligible spirit-meditation settlement every 10 active ticks, the server removes one atomic batch from ordinary player inventory: one stone for qi-sensing mortal and N stones while at Qi Refining layer N. A funded batch grants 50 stage-local progress before cap clamping. Insufficient inventory removes nothing and downgrades the session to normal meditation; a failed profile commit restores every removed stack exactly.
behavior.cooldown_or_durability: No cooldown, durability, rarity override, or custom data components.
tests: registered in ModItems and exposed in myvillage:main
both non-Silk-Touch ore loot tables drop this exact item id
Fortune uses the vanilla ore-drops bonus formula
server derives the stage-owned batch cost and never accepts a client-authored count
multi-slot batch removal is all-or-nothing and rolls back on profile-commit failure
no batch is removed when progress is already capped
insufficient stones downgrade to normal meditation without a partial charge

jar_checks: English and Chinese item translation keys
both ore loot tables reference myvillage:low_grade_spirit_stone

non_goals: raw spirit stone or fragment items
right-click use behavior, cooldown, durability, rarity, or custom data components
client-authored layer, inventory slot, batch cost, progress, or settlement result
using the legacy meditation qi reserve to fund new spirit-meditation settlements
